title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.160 - Demand for trial by jury
text:
534.160.  Demand for trial by jury. — Either party shall have the right to a jury trial if a timely request therefor is made as in other civil cases.
(RSMo 1939 § 2843, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2457; 1919 § 3005; 1909 § 7667 
Effective 1-02-79
